summary: A decent 1994 audience recording that captures an okay performance, considered the best AUD of this show currently archived.
review: The single review rates the tape a modest three stars, noting it’s “not bad for ’94” and calling it the best audience source available for this concert. While no specific musical moments are highlighted, the recording is regarded as serviceable for an audience capture from that era, with no reported technical flaws.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one brief review (3 ★) provides limited detail; the comment is mildly positive about the audio but gives no insight into performance quality, leading to a cautious average rating.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewer calls it the best available audience (AUD) source for this show; no specific sound issues or praises are mentioned beyond being acceptable for a ’94 crowd recording.
